{{CargoClone
|name=Sumo Champion
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=109
|gene1={race} DEF +50
|gene2={race} CIV +50
|gene3=Each round, {race} DEF +30
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +6
|gene5=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +2
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Earth DMG +10
|gene7=Rebel Cabin, deployable robots +3
|}}
